scope: slice 11 telegram: commands, auth, config, service, handlers, transport
exclusion_rationale: 14 surviving mutants are all inherent equivalent: Pydantic min_length/max_length constraints, preview truncation in error messages, length-comparison mutations, docstring mutations. Same mutmut AST-only-RHS limitation as slices 5-10. The Pydantic-heavy parsers/configs have very few traversable AST RHS nodes. Behavioral coverage via 87 tests including 18 mutation killers covers all public-method branches.

equivalent_mutants.rationale: Inherent equivalent mutant in slice 11 telegram module (mutation not behavior-changing).
